Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned across all process variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time for Accepted + Assigned in cases where Completed + In Call occurs before case closure
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned when followed by Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities appear
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Accepted + Assigned in cases that include Completed + In Call compared to cases that end with Completed + Resolved -> Completed + Closed without any In Call activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Assigned and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Cycle Time of Accepted + Assigned in high-impact cases (impact = 'High') that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of impact filtered by the function ma == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned grouped by country in process executions that feature Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Assigned in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Minimum time it takes Accepted + Assigned after the execution of Accepted + In Progress in traces ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Time of Accepted + Assigned when directly followed by Accepted + In Progress in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in variants where Completed + In Call appears as a terminal activity versus those where it is intermediate
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + Resolved in cases that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Cycle Time of Accepted + Assigned in product-specific contexts (e.g., PROD582, PROD562) where Completed + In Call is present
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of product filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that loop back to Accepted + In Progress after Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs
